title: 6 new briefing variants from Design Daily Briefing Variations3 figma
description: Add narrative (prose + entity chips), priority (ranked cards + reasoning), memo (formal TO/FROM/RE + checkable actions), delta (what changed overnight), standup (yesterday/today/watch tabs), digest (newsletter story cards) variants to the briefing builder.
resolution: Added 6 briefing variants from Design Daily Briefing Variations3 figma: narrative (prose + entity chips), priority (ranked cards + reasoning), memo (TO/FROM/RE + checkable actions), delta (urgent/changed/new/unchanged), standup (yesterday/today/watch tabs), digest (story cards + tags). 22 required DOM roles proved. 6 sample configs with inline data. All 18 prove commands pass (6060 checks).
